description: A customer wants to apply for financing pre-approval before visiting the dealership.

nodes.task_description: Collect the customer's personal information, employment details, and income for the credit application.

expected_outcome.value: Agent securely gathers all necessary information for the application.

nodes.task_description: Submit the application to the financing partners and retrieve the credit decision.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the application and receives a 'pre-approved' status with a maximum loan amount.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the pre-approval status, the approved amount, and the next steps.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the results and what the customer needs to bring to the dealership.
